quote.text: O Lord, send down Your grace to help me, that I may glorify Your name. Grant me humility, love, and obedience. Implant in me the root of all blessings: the reverence of You in my heart.
quote.author: St. John Chrysostom

quote.text: Everywhere, wherever you may find yourself, you can set up an altar to God in your mind by means of prayer.
quote.author: St. John Chrysostom
